testcase.name: test_register_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: tests/test_mobile_api_v2.py:68: in test_register_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code == 200, f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","date_of_birth"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"mobile_reg_test_1777586113@example.com","password":"Test1234!","display_name":"RegTestUser","age_confirmed":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_duplicate_email

error.message: failed on setup with "Failed: Could not register test user: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","date_of_birth"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"email":"mobile_test_1777586113@example.com","password":"Test1234!","display_name":"MobileTestUser","age_confirmed":true},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]}"
